sets.title: Define → Implement → Deploy
sets.caption: A clean three-stage pipeline. The ribbon pinches where "implement" can't keep up — the bottleneck is visible, not annotated.

sets.title: Startup under load
sets.caption: Before and after: what happens to flow when a small team scales past its constraint.

sets.title: Build & test environment
sets.caption: Slow, shared build-and-test turned fast and parallel — step between the two states.

sets.title: Review turnaround
sets.caption: Code review as a queue, before and after the wait is cut.

sets.title: Many lanes at once
sets.caption: Forks, merges, and parallel lanes converging through shared stages.

sets.title: Coordination & gates
sets.caption: Enterprise gates and rejection edges — work that loops back instead of flowing through.

sets.title: The moving constraint
sets.caption: Three states: widen the real constraint, then widen the wrong stage and watch nothing improve.

sets.title: A shared AI context layer
sets.caption: Before and after a shared context layer unblocks parallel AI-assisted delivery.
